# What Is My Cloud Name for ZSDK?

**Source:** https://help.zscaler.com/zsdk/what-my-cloud-name-zsdk
**Captured:** 2026-04-26 via Playwright MCP (innerText extraction of <article>).

---

Zscaler SDK for Mobile Apps Help 
Getting Started 
What Is My Cloud Name for ZSDK?
Zscaler SDK for Mobile Apps
What Is My Cloud Name for ZSDK?
Ask Zscaler

To maximize operational efficiency, Zscaler built a highly scalable, global multi-cloud infrastructure for Zscaler SDK for Mobile Apps (ZSDK). An organization is provisioned on one cloud and its traffic is processed by that cloud only.

You might need to whitelist your cloud URL to access ZSDK.

You can find the name of the cloud in the URL that admins use to log in to the Zscaler service.

If an organization logs in to admin.zsdkone.net, then that organization's cloud name is zsdkone.net.
